{ "name": "clsx", "version": "2.1.1", "repository": "lukeed/clsx", "description": "A tiny (239B) utility for constructing className strings conditionally.", "module": "dist/clsx.mjs", "unpkg": "dist/clsx.min.js", "main": "dist/clsx.js", "types": "clsx.d.ts", "license": "MIT", "exports": { ".": { "import": { "types": "./clsx.d.mts", "default": "./dist/clsx.mjs" }, "default": { "types": "./clsx.d.ts", "default": "./dist/clsx.js" } }, "./lite": { "import": { "types": "./clsx.d.mts", "default": "./dist/lite.mjs" }, "default": { "types": "./clsx.d.ts", "default": "./dist/lite.js" } } }, "author": { "name": "Luke Edwards", "email": "luke.edwards05@gmail.com", "url": "https://lukeed.com" }, "engines": { "node": ">=6" }, "scripts": { "build": "node bin", "test": "uvu -r esm test" }, "files": [ "*.d.mts", "*.d.ts", "dist" ], "keywords": [ "classes", "classname", "classnames" ], "devDependencies": { "esm": "3.2.25", "terser": "4.8.0", "uvu": "0.5.4" } }
